instruction: During the specified time range of March 12, 2021, from 23:30 to 00:00, there was a system failure. groundtruth: answer 1: component=apache02; reason=network packet loss; datetime=2021-03-12 23:33:00
scoring_points: The only root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2021-03-12 23:33:00

instruction: During the specified time range of March 12, 2021, from 16:00 to 16:30, the system experienced two failures.
